title: Blasphemous 2 - Complete Sacrament Edition
description:
Blasphemous 2 - Complete Sacrament Edition
Blasphemous 2 Complete Sacrament Edition Includes:

Blasphemous 2

The second scripture in the Blasphemous series portends the return of The Penitent One, with a story that continues from the free Wounds of Eventide DLC for the original game, where The Heart in the sky heralded the return of The Miracle and foretold the birth of a new miracle child.

Blasphemous 2 offers more chances to customise and improve your skill set, along with several new unique weapons to wield with righteous zeal and unending fury, victory might just be within grasp.

Mea Culpa Expansion

Embark on a brand new quest, to reforge the iconic Mea Culpa. Strike down the enemies who stand in your way as you reveal new pathways within Cvstodia to forgotten areas. Feel the stinging pain in your hands from the punishment you embraced, once more.

Blasphemous 2 Digital Artbook

Dive deep into the stunning world and making of Blasphemous 2 with the Digital Artbook.

Blasphemous 2 Original Sound Track

Become immersed in the world of The Penitent One with the Blasphemous 2 original soundtrack.
